title: Lupinaster burchellianus
taxonomy: Lupinaster burchellianus is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Oleaceae. It is native to South Africa and is a member of the genus Lupinaster. The classification of this plant further breaks down into the kingdom Plantae, phylum Magnoliophyta, class Magnoliopsida, and order Lamiales. Its classification is based on its morphology, anatomy, and molecular characteristics. This classification helps in understanding the evolutionary relationships and diversity within the plant kingdom.
